body:
## Problem
Generic "Failed to save" error messages lack a clear recovery path.

## Impact
- High frustration
- Poor error diagnosis and recovery (Heuristic #8)

## Tasks
- [ ] Categorize errors (Storage Full, Network Lost, Server Error)
- [ ] Add action buttons to error toasts (e.g., "Retry," "Download Backup")
- [ ] Provide a "Manual Save" button that appears only when auto-save fails
title: [UX-08] Add Specific Error Recovery Actions to UI
